theme.vibe: Authentic Czech pub culture, editorial directory, premium beer magazine

rules.h1: text-4xl sm:text-5xl lg:text-6xl tracking-tighter font-serif text-stone-900
rules.h2: text-2xl sm:text-3xl lg:text-4xl tracking-tight font-serif text-stone-900

layout_and_spacing.spacing_philosophy: Generous spacing. Use p-6, p-8, p-12. Avoid cramped containers.

buttons.primary: bg-amber-700 hover:bg-amber-800 text-white font-sans px-6 py-3 rounded-none border border-amber-900 transition-colors
buttons.secondary: bg-transparent border border-stone-300 hover:border-amber-700 text-stone-900 hover:text-amber-800 px-6 py-3 rounded-none transition-colors

cards.pub_card: bg-[#F3F0EA] border border-stone-200/60 p-6 hover:-translate-y-1 hover:shadow-lg transition-all duration-300 flex flex-col gap-4

inputs.style: bg-transparent border-b-2 border-stone-300 hover:border-amber-700 focus:border-amber-700 focus:ring-0 rounded-none px-0 py-2 text-stone-900 font-sans transition-colors

badges.beer_tag: bg-amber-100/50 text-amber-900 text-xs px-2 py-1 rounded-sm uppercase tracking-wider font-semibold border border-amber-200/50

features_spec.directory_list: Use a masonry or responsive grid (1 col mobile, 2 tablet, 3 desktop). Filter sidebar on left, pub list on right for desktop.
features_spec.random_picker: Big, bold feature section. A 'Kam dnes na pivo?' button that runs a quick slot-machine animation through pub names before stopping on one.
features_spec.pub_crawl_planner: Interactive timeline or connected dots layout where users can add pubs to build a route.
features_spec.promoted_pubs: Marquee or a special featured section at the top of the directory with a 'Tracing Beam' or subtle gold border.

imagery.rules: Use the provided hop leaf images for hero section backgrounds (with white/20 overlay or gradient overlay) or section dividers.

urls.description: Detailed close-up of fresh green hop flowers with raindrops

animations.list_entrance: Staggered fade-in-up for pub cards using Framer Motion.
animations.marquee: Slow, smooth drift for districts or top beer brands (react-fast-marquee).

accessibility.contrast: Ensure all text over images uses proper overlays (e.g., bg-black/40 or bg-white/60).
accessibility.testing: All interactive elements MUST have data-testid.

instructions_to_main_agent: Build a modern editorial-style directory for Prague pubs.
Use pure HTML/Tailwind for structural layouts, and customize Shadcn components for interactivity (filters, dropdowns, forms).
Include font imports for Cormorant Garamond and Manrope in the main CSS or index.html.
Implement the 'Kam dnes na pivo?' random picker with a slight motion delay for excitement.
Ensure 'data-testid' is present on all buttons, links, and form elements.
Use the provided hop leaf images creatively as backgrounds (with appropriate opacity/blend modes) to establish the beer culture vibe without needing actual beer photos.
Use .js extension for React components (as requested: 'You have .js files not .tsx file, so share the guideline for .js files not for .tsx files')
